message:
feat(search): add incremental document indexing pipeline and search-index robot commands

Introduce a new search/indexing module (1460 lines) providing
content-addressed document indexing with:
- Scrollback chunk extraction from terminal capture
- Command-output block extraction for structured indexing
- Agent artifact extraction for cross-pane correlation
- SHA-256 content-hash dedup to avoid redundant index entries
- Batched persistence with configurable flush-by-doc-count/interval
- TTL expiry and size-bound LRU eviction for index maintenance
- Throughput ceiling to avoid saturating disk I/O

Add SearchIndexingConfig to ft.toml for index directory, max size, TTL,
flush interval, and throughput ceiling configuration.

Wire up two new robot subcommands:
- ft robot search-index stats: health snapshot with doc count, freshness,
  segment count, embedder tiers, and error state
- ft robot search-index reindex: full rebuild from captured segments +
  pane metadata with per-batch progress tracking

Enrich robot search responses with semantic_score, fusion_rank, and a
metrics object exposing pipeline diagnostics (effective/requested mode,
fallback reason, RRF-k, latency, cache hits, budget state).

Thread SearchConfig through IPC so ft robot status includes search_index
and search_health in its payload. Add SearchIndexStatsData and related
robot response types.

Change default fusion_backend from "legacy" to "frankensearch" across
config, storage tests, mcp tests, and storage_regression benchmarks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -468,6 +468,38 @@ pub struct SearchHit {
     pub fusion_rank: Option<usize>,
 }
 
+/// Response data for `ft robot search-index stats`.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct SearchIndexStatsData {
+    pub index_dir: String,
+    pub state_path: String,
+    pub format_version: u32,
+    pub document_count: usize,
+    pub segment_count: usize,
+    pub index_size_bytes: u64,
+    pub pending_docs: usize,
+    pub max_index_size_bytes: u64,
+    pub ttl_days: u64,
+    pub flush_interval_secs: u64,
+    pub flush_docs_threshold: usize,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub newest_captured_at_ms: Option<i64>,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub oldest_captured_at_ms: Option<i64>,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub freshness_age_ms: Option<i64>,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub last_update_ts: Option<i64>,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub source_counts: BTreeMap<String, usize>,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub embedder_tiers_available: Vec<String>,
+    pub background_job_status: String,
+    pub indexing_error_count: usize,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub last_error: Option<String>,
+}
+
 /// Response data for `ft robot events`.
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
 pub struct EventsData {
